_doc: KARTA Odsaczek (skladany stalowy koszyk do smazenia i odsaczania) — zrodlo prawdy BRAMEK (qa_gate/product_gate). Anatomia = checklista, NIE tekst promptow. Zrodlo: galeria Ali detail g0-g3 + ali_video (funkcje). Wzorzec @kitchen_in_china 717k plays.

product.nazwa: collapsible stainless steel wire frying and draining basket
product.anatomy_str: a round collapsible stainless-steel wire-mesh basket made of flexible spiral chain-link wire; a crown of triangular wire ribs (zig-zag points) around the top rim; TWO hinged wire handle-arms that fold up and meet at the top to form a single carry-bail; bare polished silver/chrome stainless steel, no coating, no plastic, no color; collapses flat into a round spiral disk for storage; open wire mesh with no solid bottom; zero logos, zero text
product.functional_count: ONE wire basket bowl with a crown of triangular wire ribs and TWO fold-up wire handle-arms meeting as a single top bail (exactly one basket, never two baskets, never a solid-bottom fryer basket)
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE wire basket in the scene; the other hand holds a plate, the wok, or nothing — never a second basket
product._cv_reliable_why: bare polished stainless-steel/chrome wire = srebrny/metaliczny (playbook gadzet §4: metal -> maska HSV bezuzyteczna; odbicia, olej i jasne tlo wpadaja w to samo pasmo V); licznik egzemplarzy robi VLM wiersz-na-klatke.
forbidden_leaks: cartoon tiger or animal-face mural on the wall (orange and black) — wzorzec wall decor, NIGDY nie odwzorowuj
Haier / Konka / any brand text on the cooktop or appliances
Chinese characters or any baked-in on-screen text or captions
green crown-embossed canisters or foreign shop kitchen decor
solid-bottom metal fryer basket (ours is OPEN wire mesh, collapsible)
plastic handle grips or colored coating on the wire
closed rigid basket that cannot fold flat
oil turning into white foam, bubbles rendered as blobs or clumps
readable text or brand logo anywhere on the product
elements: kosz_siatka — round collapsible wire-mesh bowl of spiral chain-link stainless wire (open mesh, no solid bottom)
korona_trojkatow — crown of triangular wire ribs (zig-zag points) around the top rim that give the bowl its shape when expanded
kablak_uchwyt — TWO hinged wire handle-arms that fold up and meet at the top as a single carry-bail; polished steel, no plastic grip
spirala_srodek — the tightly wound spiral center of the mesh, most visible when the basket is folded flat into a disk
material — bare polished silver stainless steel throughout, no coating, no color, no logo

mechanism_states._doc: zmiana stanu (rozlozony <-> zlozony na plasko) = CIECIE+SFX miedzy scenami, NIGDY ciagla animacja skladania (topologia siatki = najtrudniejsza fizyka; doktryna 0i v3 pkt 3)

scenography.layout: bright clean modern home kitchen: white square-tile backsplash, light stone or white countertop, a plain round black wok or frying pan with a wood handle on an induction cooktop, a cook in a green-and-white striped apron with a grey oven mitt; airy and uncluttered; NO wall murals, NO cartoon decor, NO brand logos, NO foreign canisters, NO on-screen text
scenography.swiatlo: bright high-key warm natural daylight, soft clean shadows, appetizing golden warmth on the fried food

action_steps: load the basket with food and lower it by the bail handle into hot oil
the basket sits submerged, food bubbling in the oil
lift the basket straight up so hot oil drains as droplets through the open wire mesh back into the wok
optionally rest the basket on the wok rim so it drains hands-free
tip the crispy golden food out onto a plate
collapse the empty basket flat into a round spiral disk
grammar.both_hands: one hand holds the top bail handle to lower/lift/drain; the other hand steadies the wok handle, holds the receiving plate, or presses the basket flat — the other hand never holds a second basket
grammar.physics: hot cooking oil is real liquid: bubbles gently around submerged food and falls as continuous droplets and thin streams through the mesh when lifted (gravity, no foam, no blobs); the basket is rigid open wire when expanded and its handle-arms fold up as a single bail; the state change expanded->flat disk is a CUT, never a continuous morph; the basket is lowered vertically with the handle held above the oil

screens_and_text: no screens and no readable text anywhere in frame; the cooktop carries no brand text; any incidental label is out of frame or blurred and illegible
